title: Battle of Null (Crimson Nova)

{{Quote|Master Windu will make planetfall shortly, but our lines are giving way. This area may get over-run. We had better make plans to evac.|[[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] to [[T'ra Saa/Legends|T'ra Saa]]|<ref name="Republic 65" />}}
The '''battle of Null''' was fought during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] after the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Null/Legends|Null]] joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Republic 65" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Null had become a battlezone between [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and Separatist forces. A triage unit overseen by [[Jedi healer/Legends|Jedi healers]] was set up behind Republic lines, though by this point, it was in danger of being over-run by enemy forces.<ref name="Republic 65" />

==The battle==
[[File:Null.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] defending her patients.]]
While attempting to heal wounded [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[T'ra Saa/Legends|T'ra Saa]] and [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] were caught in an unexpected attack by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] working for the [[Crimson Nova]] chapter of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. The hunters, riding [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]], opened fire on the Jedi, killing some and setting fire to the surrounding forest. During the fight, T'ra Saa's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] was knocked from her hand and collected by [[Nazzer]], a hunter previously encountered by Offee and her master [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]], who ultimately fled the encroaching fires. Left with no alternative against the blaze, Saa used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to pull trees down over the survivors, effectively trapping them away from the flames.<ref name="Republic 65" />

A rainstorm soon doused the fires, and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] arrived on the scene to rescue the survivors. He uncovered Offee, the clones and an unconscious Saa, who had been wounded during her valiant attempt to save the group. Windu raced her to a waiting [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|gunship]] along with Offee, retreating as Separatists were spotted approaching their location. The Jedi Healer informed Windu of the details of the unexpected battle, and the Jedi Master resolved to put an end to the Crimson Nova's activities with a [[mission to the Rig]], their base of operations.<ref name="Republic 65" />

==Behind the scenes==
While the [[2004]] [[Dark Horse Comics]] issue [[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]] originally established the battle of Null to have occurred [[21 BBY/Legends|seventeen months after]] the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]],<ref name="Republic 65" /> changes to the timeline of the Clone Wars necessitated by the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (multimedia project)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' multimedia project]] moved the battle back to 22 BBY.<ref name="Date" />
